attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TRIM(replace(replace( MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE_1,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '))ADDRESS_LINE_1, 
TRIM(replace(replace( MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE_2,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')) ADDRESS_LINE_2, 
TRIM(replace(replace( MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.ADDRESS_LINE_3,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' '))ADDRESS_LINE_3, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.BILL_TO_SITE_FLAG, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.COUNTRY, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.DERIVED_LOCALE, 
TRIM(replace(replace( MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.DESCRIPTION,chr(10),' '),chr(13),' ')) DESCRIPTION, MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.DESIGNATED_RECEIVER_ID, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.GLOBAL_NAME, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.INACTIVE_DATE, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_ID, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.IN_ORGANIZATION_FLAG, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.LOCATION_CODE, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.LOCATION_ID, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.OFFICE_SITE_FLAG, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.POSTAL_CODE, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.RECEIVING_SITE_FLAG, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.REGION_1, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.REGION_2, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.SHIP_TO_LOCATION_ID, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.SHIP_TO_SITE_FLAG, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.STYLE, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.TAX_NAME, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.TELEPHONE_NUMBER_1, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.TELEPHONE_NUMBER_2, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.TELEPHONE_NUMBER_3, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.TOWN_OR_CITY, 
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL.TP_HEADER_ID 
FROM
MF_HR_LOCATIONS_ALL
WHERE  GES_UPDATE_DATE>to_date('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
